Mr. Leutza requested a continuance stating that the accounting is two thirds completed and that he was waiting for information from the Accountant regarding gains and losses. Mr. Leutza also stated that the business sold for $45,000,000.00 and that the total Estate is worth about $57,000,000.00. The matter was continued to June 12, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on filing of a Petition for Final Distribution on waiver of account.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Leutza for Matthew Mitton.

The Court expressed concern about all that remains to be done in the Estate. Mr. Leutza read the declaration from the Administrator regarding status of the Estate. Mr. Leutza is to file said document. The Court will allow $20,000.00 to the Personal Representative and $20,000.00 to the Attorney (order for the same signed in open court).
